## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what's the user-facing effect? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If I edited a canonical file (`SKILL.md`, `scripts/`, `reference/`), I ran `npm run sync` and committed the refreshed `skills/` mirror
- [ ] Added/updated a test for any parser or logic change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if this is user-facing
